assertionResults.title: Recover Success renders with copy/reveal interactions
assertionResults.reason: On /demo/recover-success, initial state showed masked NSEC (no full nsec1 string present). Clicking Reveal exposed full nsec text, and clicking Copy to Clipboard surfaced Copied! confirmation.

steps.expected: Recover success view renders with masked/private-key safety UI
steps.observed: View rendered with security warning, action row, and masked key content.

steps.expected: NSEC visibility toggles from hidden/masked to shown
steps.observed: Post-click state contained a full nsec1 value (initial state did not).
Copied! confirmation appeared and was captured.

evidence.network: No API/XHR required for this assertion; page load requests were static Vite/module assets from 127.0.0.1:5173.

summary: Validated VAL-REC-002 as passing: Recover Success renders correctly, Reveal exposes the NSEC from masked state, and Copy shows Copied! confirmation with no browser errors.
